name: IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal_Res; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal_Notf; SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS row_num, SRC.CLM_ID AS SRC_CLM_ID, SRC.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AS SRC_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, SRC.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC.PRCS_YR_MO_SK AS SRC_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.CLM_ID AS TRGT_CLM_ID, TRGT.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AS TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TRGT.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.PRCS_YR_MO_SK AS TRGT_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_CLM_LN_CCHG AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_CCHG AS TRGT ON TRGT.CLM_ID = SRC.CLM_ID AND TRGT.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO = SRC.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AND TRGT.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRC.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND TRGT.PRCS_YR_MO_SK = SRC.PRCS_YR_MO_SK AND TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}; SELECT SRC_CLM_ID, SRC_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, SRC_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_CLM_ID, TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TRGT_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal_Res FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal WHERE SRC_CLM_ID IS NULL OR SRC_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR SRC_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_PRCS_YR_MO_SK IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_PRCS_YR_MO_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL; SELECT CAST('ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS CLM_LN_CCHG IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS VARCHAR(100)) AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal_Notf WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal WHERE row_num = 1) AND '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}' = 'OUT';

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT SRC_CLM_ID, SRC_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, SRC_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_CLM_ID, TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TRGT_CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_PRCS_YR_MO_SK, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRowCntBal_Res

Description:
PROCESSING:  This job runs Balancing Full Outer Join SQL on CLM_LN_CCHG and B_CLM_LN_CCHG tables to find out if there are any fallouts.
